TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_kkayal_sa_ryax_na_'tayal, title = kkayal_sa_ryax_na_'tayal, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/kkayal_sa_ryax_na_'tayal} }

S.FORM: Kkayal sa qutux ruax ryax na 'tayal hya sawn naha' qutux ryax hya' ga, sazing qu mcka' kkayal, qutux ga qlyan, qutux ga gbyan. qlyan hya' ga aring mayzbuq ru mhtuw wagi' ru kryaxan ru gaygbyan , yaqani qu sawn maha qlyan. gbyan hya ga, aring sa mzyup suruw na rgyax qu wagi' ru kska' bzngi' ru tayhuk slwan qani qu sawn maha gbyan. mayzbuq hya ga, aring min'aring tlapaw qu kayal ru mucing sa htgan wagi' ga yasa qu sawn mayzbuq. sasan hya ga, aring slwan qu kayal ru mkaraw wagi', ru zik kryaxan, ru kska' kryaxan ga yasa qu sawn maha sasan. babaw kinryax hya lga, aring kinryax lru msrihaw wagi' yani qu sawn maha babaw kinryax. ru htagan wagi' ru mzyup balay waqi' lga, yasa qu sawn maha gaygbyan la. mlhngan hya' ga, aring smsman ru kgbyan , ru pp'abi' , ru kska' bzngi' , ru min'aring mqwas ngta', minpusal mqwas ngta', ru mintaytzyul mqwas ngta', nanu' yaqu mintaytzyul mqwas ngta' lga, yasa qu mmawsa' qmayah lqu 'tayal la.

Kkayal sa qutux ruax ryax na 'tayal hya sawn naha' qutux ryax hya' ga, sazing qu mcka' kkayal, qutux ga qlyan, qutux ga gbyan. qlyan hya' ga aring mayzbuq ru mhtuw wagi' ru kryaxan ru gaygbyan , yaqani qu sawn maha qlyan. gbyan hya ga, aring sa mzyup suruw na rgyax qu wagi' ru kska' bzngi' ru tayhuk slwan qani qu sawn maha gbyan. mayzbuq hya ga, aring min'aring tlapaw qu kayal ru mucing sa htgan wagi' ga yasa qu sawn mayzbuq. sasan hya ga, aring slwan qu kayal ru mkaraw wagi', ru zik kryaxan, ru kska' kryaxan ga yasa qu sawn maha sasan. babaw kinryax hya lga, aring kinryax lru msrihaw wagi' yani qu sawn maha babaw kinryax. ru htagan wagi' ru mzyup balay waqi' lga, yasa qu sawn maha gaygbyan la. mlhngan hya' ga, aring smsman ru kgbyan , ru pp'abi' , ru kska' bzngi' , ru min'aring mqwas ngta', minpusal mqwas ngta', ru mintaytzyul mqwas ngta', nanu' yaqu mintaytzyul mqwas ngta' lga, yasa qu mmawsa' qmayah lqu 'tayal la.
S.PHON: kkajal s~ɕa qutux ruax rjax na ʔtajal ħja s~ɕawn naħaʔ qutux rjax ħjaʔ ɣa, s~ɕaziŋ qu mʦ~ʨkaʔ kkajal, qutux ɣa qljan, qutux ɣa ɣβjan. qljan ħjaʔ ɣa ariŋ majzβuq ru mħtuw waɣiʔ ru krjaxan ru ɣajɣβjan , jaqani qu s~ɕawn maħa qljan. ɣβjan ħja ɣa, ariŋ s~ɕa mzjup s~ɕuruw na rɣjax qu waɣiʔ ru ks~ɕkaʔ βzŋiʔ ru tajħuk s~ɕlwan qani qu s~ɕawn maħa ɣβjan. majzβuq ħja ɣa, ariŋ minʔariŋ tlapaw qu kajal ru muʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕa ħtɣan waɣiʔ ɣa jas~ɕa qu s~ɕawn majzβuq. s~ɕas~ɕan ħja ɣa, ariŋ s~ɕlwan qu kajal ru mkaraw waɣiʔ, ru zik krjaxan, ru ks~ɕkaʔ krjaxan ɣa jas~ɕa qu s~ɕawn maħa s~ɕas~ɕan. βaβaw kinrjax ħja lɣa, ariŋ kinrjax lru ms~ɕriħaw waɣiʔ jani qu s~ɕawn maħa βaβaw kinrjax. ru ħtaɣan waɣiʔ ru mzjup βalaj waqiʔ lɣa, jas~ɕa qu s~ɕawn maħa ɣajɣβjan la. mlħŋan ħjaʔ ɣa, ariŋ s~ɕms~ɕman ru kɣβjan , ru ppʔaβiʔ , ru ks~ɕkaʔ βzŋiʔ , ru minʔariŋ mqwas~ɕ ŋtaʔ, minpus~ɕal mqwas~ɕ ŋtaʔ, ru mintajtzjul mqwas~ɕ ŋtaʔ, nanuʔ jaqu mintajtzjul mqwas~ɕ ŋtaʔ lɣa, jas~ɕa qu mmaws~ɕaʔ qmajaħ lqu ʔtajal la.
